basic_details.job_title: Department of Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Ranipet Casework Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Department of Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Ranipet
basic_details.short_information: Department of Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Ranipet Caseworker Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of the Department of Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Ranipet. A total of 3 Caseworker vacancies have been announced through the Department of Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Ranipet Caseworker Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors in Social Work, Counselling Psychology or Development Management
qualification.details: Post: Caseworker Qualifications: Bachelors in Social Work, Counselling Psychology or Development Management Experience: 1 year experience in family violence counselling or similar role in a voluntary organization.

physical_eligibility.details: Candidates should download and read the Department of Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Ranipet Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. | Download Department of Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Ranipet Caseworker Job 2026 Notification PDF

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Department of Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Ranipet Casework Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ranipet.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Department of Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Ranipet Casework Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://ranipet.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Department of Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Ranipet recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the வழக்குப் பணியாளர் posts is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Case Worker position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Social Work, Counselling Psychology, or Development Management to be eligible for the வழக்குப் பணியாளர் role.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Case Worker post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the வழக்குப் பணியாளர் position announced by the Department of Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Ranipet.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Case Worker post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the வழக்குப் பணியாளர் post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 18,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contract-based positions. The job type is specified as 'Contract'.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to download the application form from the official website and submit it in person or by post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application submission address?
faq.answer: The application should be submitted to: மாவட்ட சமூகநல அலுவலகம், 4வது தளம், சி பிளாக், மாவட்ட ஆட்சியர் அலுவலகம், இராணிப்பேட்டை மாவட்டம்.

faq.question: Q9. Does the recruitment mention any application fee?
faq.answer: Based on the provided data, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is required for the Case Worker role?
faq.answer: Applicants need to have at least 1 year of experience in family violence counselling or a similar role within a voluntary organization.
